canaries.proves: GC preserves active grants, approvals, locks, incidents, and anchor evidence.
Erasure tombstones are not treated as equivalent to available evidence.
An engaged emergency stop blocks new effects and budget reservations.
Costly provider or tool spend requires an active budget reservation.
Rolling system or project limits deny runaway graphs independent of per-run budgets.
Open adapter circuits deny new admission authority while coding-quality misses alone do not.
